gitCommit.subject: fix(lint+null-safety): remove dead imports in StockDashboard, add null guards in useOrgData (#993)
gitCommit.body:
fix(lint+null-safety): remove dead imports in StockDashboard, add null guards in useOrgData (#993)

* fix(lint): add falls-through directive for intentional switch fallthrough

The in_stock → incoming case fallthrough in useVariantStock summary
aggregation is intentional (incoming products count as in_stock for
dashboard buckets). Replace the multi-line SSOT comment with the
ESLint-recognized `// falls through` directive to satisfy no-fallthrough.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_01Gamz2W28joKXru65aw28k1

* fix(lint+null-safety): remove dead imports in StockDashboard, add null guards in useOrgData

StockDashboard.tsx: remove unused Shield, Tooltip*, cn, HealthScoreInfoDialog,
calcHealthScore imports and the dead healthScore useMemo (all introduced by
merge commit 2427397 — the component no longer renders the health score widget).

useOrgData.ts: add !data guards after .single() in useOrgCreate and useOrgUpdate.
Supabase returns data=null without error when RLS blocks the returning SELECT;
previously this would silently return null to callers expecting a record.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Gamz2W28joKXru65aw28k1

* fix(ts): resolve 3 pre-existing TS errors unmasked by baseline=0

useOrgData.test.ts: cast partial mock return to ReturnType<typeof useOrganization>
to satisfy OrganizationContextType (TS2345, 2 sites).

ssot-fallback.test.ts: add intermediate `unknown` cast for module type assertion
(TS2352).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Gamz2W28joKXru65aw28k1

* fix: remove marcadores restantes de ssot-fallback.test.ts (PR#993)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

specs.title: 93 · Login com credenciais inválidas permanece em /login
94 · RLS bloqueia leitura de tabelas sensíveis para o usuário comum
clique em 'Continuar com Google' dispara authorize com provider=google
/auth/callback com code válido troca por sessão e autentica usuário
/auth/callback com ?error= mostra hint detalhado e código do erro
mostra erro para link inválido (sem token)
renderiza formulário quando há token no hash
valida força da senha e critérios em tempo real
deve realizar login com sucesso e redirecionar para a home

annotations.description: E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD ou E2E_USER_EMAIL/PASSWORD não configurados — smoke login pulado em CI sem credenciais
E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD ou E2E_USER_EMAIL/PASSWORD não configurados — smoke login pulado em CI sem credenciais

specs.title: deve bloquear acesso a rotas protegidas quando deslogado
deve exibir formulário de esqueci minha senha
